title: Here They Lie.
content:
Here they lie who once learned here
         All that is taught of hurt or fear;
     Dead, but by free will they died:
         They were true men, they had pride.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert von Ranke Graves, titled "Here They Lie.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
